ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov, via Zoom, for Shanay Carter, suspended Administrator.

The court acknowledges counsel's efforts in bringing this matter closer to completion.

The Petition is submitted. The Status of Appointment of Successor Personal Representative and the Order to Show Cause are off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition To Appoint Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov, via ZOOM, for Shanay Carter, Administrator (suspended).

The court confirms with counsel that he has been unable to locate his client. Counsel reports that he has confirmed with Approved Inheritance advised him that they intend to hire a private investigator to attempt to locate her. Counsel reports that he has spoken to Ms. Carter's mother who advised him that she does not know where her daughter is. The court asks counsel if he intends to file an accounting and reminds counsel that pursuant to probate code, the court can order one. Counsel advises that he can prepare one, but that it will be difficult to do since he cannot locate his client to obtain financial records. The court then asks if he has attempted to find someone to act as successor administrator. Counsel reports that he has been unsuccessful in finding someone to act as successor administrator and specifically mentions the San Francisco Public Administrator as not willing to take this matter. The court confirms with counsel that Approved Inheritance is not a creditor but an assignee and that they should be served notice regarding the next calling of this matter.

The Status Petition is submitted. The Status of Two-year Accounting is taken off calendar. The Status to Appoint Successor Administrator is continued to Jan-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status of Filing of Accounting is set for Jan-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause as to why this Estate should not be closed is set for Jan-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court is to serve the Order to Show Cause on Michael Dobrov, Approved Inheritance Cash, Inc., DBA Approved Cash, Shanay Carter, and Jacqueline Carter.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Two-Year Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Continued To Aug-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov, via ZOOM, for Shanay Carter, Susp. Administrator.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding the status of filing of a two-year accounting. Counsel reports that the suspended Administrator has been unresponsive despite several attempts to contact her. Accordingly, the assets of the estate are unknown to him. Counsel reports that he has contacted the San Francisco Public Administrator's office to ask if they would be willing to serve as successor Administrator, but that they do not seem eager to do so. Court and counsel continue to discuss how he might be able to determine the assets in the estate in order to file an accounting. Counsel reports that Approved Inheritance Cash, Inc., may have issued a check to the administrator for the sale of a portion of the estate and he may be able to use to track estate assets.

The Status of Petition for Appointment of Successor Administrator and Status of Accounting are continued to August 3, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition To Appoint Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Continued To Aug-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov, via ZOOM, counsel for Shanay Carter, Administrator.

The court begins by querying Mr. Dobrov why he and his client did not appear at the previously scheduled hearing in this matter. Mr. Dobrov reports that he has still not heard from his client and that he failed to appear due to a calendaring oversight. The court then advises Mr. Dobrov that it appears as though a disclaimer from the decedent's sister has not been filed. Mr. Dobrov advises that he included a disclaimer from the decedent's sister in the initial petition. After additional discussion, the court suspends current Administrator Shanay Carter in open court. The court then orders counsel to file a petition to appoint a successor administrator, a two-year accounting and a Report on Status of Close of Estate. A status hearing on all three (3) of the previously mentioned filings is set for June 22, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order of Status Hearing (Order to Appear) is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Continued To May-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Continued To May-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Shanay Carter (Administrator).

The Court asked if Mr. Dobrov has heard from approved inheritance cash. Mr. Dobrov stated that he hasn't heard from them, that he spoke briefly with inheritance cash a couple of months ago, and that he left them a message this morning, but there was no response. Mr. Dobrov also stated that communication with Ms. Carter has been difficult, and that he has called her and has left messages, but she does not respond. The Court stated that it is close to calling it as an Administrator that is not around. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to May 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is also continued to that date with respect to Shanay Carter.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Continued To Apr-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Personal Representative Shanay Carter and the Attorney Michael Dobrov to appear on April 13, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The Petition for Order Approving Status of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-24-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Continued To Dec-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Shanay Carter.

The Court stated that it was hoping to have had either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Dobrov stated that he will have to file a report, that he is having difficulty with his Client, that she is being non-responsive, and spoke of the various phone calls he made and letters he sent for which he has received no response. Mr. Dobrov also stated that he does not know what to do and that he thinks his Client took out a small advance from what's coming in as cash. Status on close of estate is continued to December 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dobrov is to have his petition filed by December 22, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
